description_long: This object is a tall, rectangular lotion bottle with a minimalist design, featuring a smooth, matte surface. The front face displays subtle printed text, likely including branding and product information, while the back face contains more detailed labeling, such as ingredients and usage instructions. The bottle is made of opaque plastic, giving it a clean, modern appearance. The cap is integrated seamlessly with the body, suggesting a simple closure mechanism, possibly a screw-on or snap-on type. There are no visible decorative graphics, with the design relying on text and layout for visual interest. The overall form is sleek and utilitarian, suitable for personal care use in urban environments.
description: A tall, rectangular, matte plastic lotion bottle with minimalist printed text and a seamless cap.
description_view_0: Front view showing subtle printed text and branding details on a smooth, matte surface.
description_view_1: Side view revealing a plain, unmarked surface with no visible text or graphics.
description_view_2: Back view displaying detailed printed labeling, likely including ingredients and instructions.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, plain and unmarked, mirroring the other side.
attribute_product_name: AHA BHA PHA 30 Days Miracle Toner
